data.name: Sealed
data.requires: |Chapter 16| OR {YamlEnabled(Disable_SealLogic)} OR {YamlEnabled(Mad_King_Goal)} OR ({YamlEnabled(Enable_Paralogues)} AND (|Paralogue 6| OR |Paralogue 10| OR |Paralogue 16|))

data.name: Victory Achieved
